subcodes.first_line: O Forgiver of sins, pardon and conceal the transgressions of the wrongdoers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آمرزگار گناه ببخش و خطاى تبه کاران را بپوش
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
